strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_BORG_MASTERY_DESC: Como Ciborgue, vença o jogo ou aniquile em Monção ou superior.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CYBORG_MASTERY_DESC: As Cyborg, beat the game or obliterate on Monsoon or harder.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_BORG_GRANDMASTERY_DESC: Como Ciborgue, vença o jogo ou aniquile em Tufão ou superior.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_CYBORG_GRANDMASTERY_DESC: As Cyborg, beat the game or obliterate on Typhoon or harder.
